subcodes.first_line: The portal of communion hath been flung open unto all who dwell on earth and in heaven, and the nightingales of divine utterance have warbled upon the branches [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فتح باب اللقاء علی من فی الارض و السمآء و غردت عنادل البیان علی الاغصان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
